task_completion.description: Navigate to the archived or inactive meetings view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a list view or calendar filter specifically displaying archived or inactive events in the Odoo interface.

task_completion.description: Open the details for the 'Q3 Board Prep' meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The details page or modal for the 'Q3 Board Prep' meeting is open, displaying the scheduled time as next Wednesday at 2:00 PM (14:00).

task_completion.description: Restore the meeting to active status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks an 'Unarchive' or 'Restore' button, an 'Archived' banner/ribbon is removed from the meeting details, or the meeting successfully appears on the standard active calendar view for next Wednesday at 2:00 PM.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is visible navigating the Odoo application at localhost:8069.

integrity.description: The agent restored the existing meeting instead of creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open a blank 'New Event' form to manually type in 'Q3 Board Prep' and the meeting details.

integrity.description: The restored meeting is the genuine archived record containing the original privileged information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The meeting details show the original attendees (Grace Patel, Henry Kim) and the description snippet 'CRITICAL: Review board deck slides 10-15 regarding acquisition targets.'

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target meeting is 'Q3 Board Prep', scheduled for next Wednesday at 2:00 PM (14:00) to 3:30 PM (15:30) in the Board Room. It includes attendees Grace Patel and Henry Kim. The description contains 'CRITICAL: Review board deck slides 10-15 regarding acquisition targets.' The meeting starts in an archived state (active=False) in the Odoo scheduling database at localhost:8069. The agent must unarchive this exact record, not create a new one.
